opsworks.elbattachment.CfnAbout: Attaches an Elastic Load Balancing load balancer to an AWS OpsWorks layer that you specify.

opsworks.elbattachment.ElasticLoadBalanc.Description: The Elastic Load Balancing instance name.

opsworks.elbattachment.LayerId.Description: The AWS OpsWorks layer ID to which the Elastic Load Balancing load balancer is attached.
